title: lycianthes laevis var. gouakae
intro: Lycianthes laevis var. gouakae is a variety of flowering plant in the Solanaceae family, commonly known as a type of nightshade. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation due to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Lycianthes laevis var. gouakae include its potential to help manage hypertension, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
